title: Sorting in Table View
excerpt: I’d really like to be able to sort the table view. It automatically decides the order the boards appear in and I have not been able to figure out how to sort it.

posts.author: ksopas (Klaudia Sopas)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d really like to be able to sort the table view. It automatically decides the order the boards appear in and I have not been able to figure out how to sort it.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ksopas any welcome to the community. You can sort table views and save as multiple new views as needed. All the information you need is available here.

Hope this helps!
Mark

posts.author: ksopas (Klaudia Sopas)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @mark.anley , thank you for reaching out but that’s for sorting boards, not the table view in dashboards. I want to sort the order of the boards that are being viewed in the table. Right now when viewing multiple boards in a table it does not appear that you can choose the order they appear.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @ksopas - sorry for the misunderstanding. The reasoning behind this is that you can have boards of varying design in the same view. I don’t know of a way to accomplish this. You have it logged in the right place to potentially be added as a future feature.

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: UhUknow (Matthew Sherman)
posts.cookedHtml: Was this feature ever added does anyone know?
